nasb.text: And his ears were opened, and the impediment of his tongue was removed, and he began speaking plainly.

esv.text: And his ears were opened, his tongue was released, and he spoke plainly.

cnv.text: 那人的耳朵就開了，舌頭也鬆了，說話也準確了。

ccb.text: 他的耳朵立刻开了，舌头灵活了，说话也清楚了。

csbs.text: 他的耳朵立刻开了，舌结也解了，说话也清楚了。
